identity.name: The Lesser Piper
identity.story: Cousin of the famous one. Strictly rodents, strictly contracted, references available on request.

relationships.kind: insists clockwork is outside his contract

collects on a debt he didn't earn, at his own rate, and has never once said it isn't his to collect; tonight the chalked total ran one coin past his own posted rate, same as it has every hush the miller's paid it, and for the first time he didn't fold the extra into the tally — set it on the corner of the board instead, uncounted, not yet sure whether it's the miller's to take back or his to keep for saying nothing all this time

behavior.label: The Lesser Piper's rounds, rats only, strictly

children.label: setting up beneath Tick's favorite window
insisting, right back at Tick, that clockwork was never in his contract

child.label: standing still long enough to be paid

children.label: circling back to the heart instead of past it
taking the coin the Miller keeps insisting on, still not saying whose debt it is

child.label: totting up the debt before he sleeps

children.label: chalking this month's rat count on the stall board, complaint from Tick or no complaint from Tick

finding the sum run one coin past his own posted rate again, and for the first time not folding the extra into the tally — setting it on the corner of the board instead, uncounted, not yet sure whose it is to spend
